step_title: repair trusted system broadcast server internal_error
summary: local backend repair completed for trusted system broadcast internal_error: the root cause was a leftover ORM-style attribute access in event_bus.py::_sender_receipt_payload(), where plain event dict publishing still referenced event.event_type. the minimal fix changed that access to event.get("event_type") while keeping the plain-event-envelope publish design intact. local verification was limited to py_compile of event_bus.py and a source check confirming the offending path no longer expects .event_type on a dict. ready for server-test redeploy/retry.
tests: source check: _sender_receipt_payload now uses event.get("event_type") and no longer contains event.event_type
